summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json, which is a metadata/state tracking file. No actual frontend code changes were made to implement either REQ-1 (cycling slogans in GlobeView) or REQ-2 (fix perpetual loading in Stations tab). Both requirements remain in 'pending' status in the project state file, confirming no implementation has occurred.
